title: 9:16 Vertical Nine Portrait AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dreamy warm-bedroom 35mm film portrait built around 9:16 vertical, nine-panel 3x3 collage of a Korean female idol portrait series., low-angle stance with one hand or prop reaching toward the viewer, and Background: minimal indoor studio, plain wall or soft window light. Subject: 9:16 vertical, nine-panel 3x3 collage of a Korean female idol portrait series. appears as the adult portrait subject, modestly covered by bedding, with natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, and realistic relaxed expression. Scene: Background: minimal indoor studio, plain wall or soft window light. creates the warm cozy bedroom atmosphere with cream sheets, pale wood, soft daylight, subtle haze, and realistic shadows. Composition: low-angle stance with one hand or prop reaching toward the viewer; fixed shallow depth of field, soft focus, tender atmosphere, close bedroom crop, blanket as foreground texture, and quiet film-photo intimacy. Signature Elements: Natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, cream blanket coverage, cozy bedroom texture, and warm film grain remain the source style anchors. Style: Dreamy 35mm film-style bedroom portrait with cinematic grain, warm gentle tones, soft natural light, realistic skin, and a tender editorial mood. Color Palette: Fixed cream bedding, warm beige wood, soft skin tones, gentle morning light, subtle haze, and low-contrast film color. Lighting: Soft natural window light with realistic shadows, warm highlights, and gentle haze. Camera: 35mm film aesthetic with shallow depth of field, soft focus edges, and realistic close portrait framing. Restrictions: Adult subject only, modest blanket coverage, coherent anatomy, realistic skin, calm bedroom portrait mood, clean background, polished film-photo finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Scene: Background: minimal indoor studio, plain wall or soft window light. creates the warm cozy bedroom atmosphere with cream sheets, pale wood, soft daylight, subtle haze, and realistic shadows. Composition: low-angle stance with one hand or prop reaching toward the viewer; fixed shallow depth of field, soft focus, tender atmosphere, close bedroom crop, blanket as foreground texture, and quiet film-photo intimacy. Signature Elements: Natural makeup, slightly tousled hair, cream blanket coverage, cozy bedroom texture, and warm film grain remain the source style anchors. Style: Dreamy 35mm film-style bedroom portrait with cinematic grain, warm gentle tones, soft natural light, realistic skin, and a tender editorial mood. Color Palette: Fixed cream bedding, warm beige wood, soft skin tones, gentle morning light, subtle haze, and low-contrast film color. Lighting: Soft natural window light with realistic shadows, warm highlights, and gentle haze. Camera: 35mm film aesthetic with shallow depth of field, soft focus edges, and realistic close portrait framing. Restrictions: Adult subject only, modest blanket coverage, coherent anatomy, realistic skin, calm bedroom portrait mood, clean background, polished film-photo finish.
